title: Brightpick to outline the path to lights-out warehouses at Robotics Summit
title_zh: Brightpick 将在机器人峰会上勾勒实现全自动仓库的路径
abstract:
Jan Zizka, co-founder and CEO of Brightpick, will outline a practical roadmap to more autonomous warehouse operations.  
 The post  Brightpick to outline the path to lights-out warehouses at Robotics Summit  appeared first on  The Robot Report .
abstract_zh: Brightpick 联合创始人兼首席执行官 Jan Zizka 将概述一条通往更自主仓库运营的实用路线图。该消息最初发表于《机器人报告》。
tldr_zh: Brightpick CEO 将分享实现全自动仓库的实用路线图。
cover_zh: 仓库全自动化不是梦｜Brightpick CEO 揭秘实用路线图
